name: Namaadhu
subtitle: Maldives prayer times
description: Accurate Maldivian prayer times, Qibla compass, and prayer tracker.

apps.name: Namaadhu
apps.subtitle: Prayer times, Qibla & tracker
apps.localizedDescription: Namaadhu shows accurate prayer times for the Maldives, Malaysia, and beyond — with exact-time notifications, a Qibla compass, a daily prayer tracker, and Dhivehi/English support. Each country uses its official calculation method, anchored to the correct timezone wherever you are.

versions.localizedDescription: Multi-country support (Maldives + Malaysia), JSON-backed data layer, Dhivehi localization for all locations.

privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We need your location to automatically detect your nearest prayer location and provide accurate prayer times for your area.
